column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Hillsborough County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest.
We have a watch in Wesley Chapel now
the wind n stuff just started picking up. Like maybe an hour ago
that red square is just south of us. Where we went to the lagoon

I’m pretty sure one went right over us in Largo! Near Dakso park.
I was trying to get my dog to potty during a lull and all of the sudden it sounded like a helicopter to the left of us then overhead and tree branches started coming down with huge wind gusts! Out of no where! Scared the hell out of me!

I got the warning!
Scared the crap out of me!
Denis Phillips. Should we breathe now? Asking for a friend from Wimauma. 😜
we are good ❤️ we moved to lakeland
